Container.Name: librariarr
Container.Overview: Librariarr is a media library management webapp for Plex, Jellyfin, and Emby servers. This template is for users with an existing PostgreSQL database — no companion DB container needed.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: plex jellyfin emby media library management lifecycle
Container.Description: Librariarr with an external PostgreSQL database. Use this template if you already have a PostgreSQL server on your network.
Container.Requires: An existing PostgreSQL 15+ database with a user and database already created

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string pointing to your existing database (e.g., postgresql://librariarr:password@192.168.1.10:5432/librariarr)

Config.Name: Session Secret
Config.Description: Secret key for session encryption. Leave empty to auto-generate and persist in /config.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Persistent config directory for backups, image cache, and session data

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (default: 99 for Unraid nobody user)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (default: 100 for Unraid users group)
